zh.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.Tideswell, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Foljambe於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Thomas Foljambe30歲，母親Margaret Gernon29歲。他於大約1298年與Catherine Eyre在英國德比夏爾霍普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1297年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾。

zh-hans.Tideswell, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Foljambe于大约1235年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Thomas Foljambe30岁，母亲Margaret Gernon29岁。他于大约1298年与Catherine Eyre在英国德比夏爾霍普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1297年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Foljambe was born about 1235, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Foljambe, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Gernon, was 29. He married Catherine Eyre about 1298, in Hope, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1297, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Foljambe est né environ 1235, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foljambe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gernon, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Eyre environ 1298, à Hope, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1297, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Foljambe um 1235 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Foljambe 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Gernon 29. Er hat um 1298 in Hope, Derbyshire, England Catherine Eyre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1297 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe è nato il circa 1235 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Foljambe, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gernon, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Eyre circa 1298, nel Hope, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1297, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambeが約1235年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas Foljambeは30歳，母Margaret Gernonは29歳であった。約1298年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアホーペでCatherine Eyreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1297年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambe(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Foljambe(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gernon(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 영국 더비실르 홉에서 Catherine Eyre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Foljambe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gernon, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Eyre aproximadamente 1298, em Hope, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1297, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Foljambe родился около 1235 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Foljambe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gernon, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Eyre около 1298 г. в местности хоп, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1297 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности дирбишир, Англия.

Murió aproximadamente 1297, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
